description:
A GitHub Desktop fork with advanced functionality and Bitbucket, GitLab integration.

An up-to-date fork of GitHub Desktop with additional features including multiple account support, Bitbucket and GitLab integration, commit search, multiple stashes per branch, and more.
Upstream:
- GitHub Desktop 3.5.12-beta1 release notes
- GitHub Desktop 3.5.12-beta2 release notes
- GitHub Desktop 3.5.12 release notes
Changes and improvements:
- [#167] Implemented a new feature to allow managing a repository's remotes from the app.
  Select "Repository" > "Manage Remotes..." from the app's menu to view and manage the configured remotes.
Fixes:
- Fixed multiaccount support when publishing a newly created repository to GitHub.
